name: Non-Public Static Workbench Visual System Pattern Registry v1

visual_patterns.conceptual_function: Makes the surrounding page feel like an evidence condition field rather than decoration.
visual_patterns.required_visual_behavior: Layered local background field with restrained rules and calm contrast.
visual_patterns.forbidden_visual_behavior: Decorative spectacle, cyber glow, generic dashboard backing, or operational status field.
visual_patterns.non_authorization_statement: This visual pattern does not authorize engine, classifier, upload, scoring, fake/real output, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or public tool behavior.

visual_patterns.conceptual_function: Frames the workspace as contained, governed, and institutionally calm.
visual_patterns.required_visual_behavior: Stable chamber surface, quiet edge, and readable hierarchy.
visual_patterns.forbidden_visual_behavior: Metric panel, product hero, command console, or operational workbench launch.
visual_patterns.non_authorization_statement: This visual pattern does not authorize engine, classifier, upload, scoring, fake/real output, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or public tool behavior.

visual_patterns.conceptual_function: Makes artifact-subject separation visible as a boundary condition.
visual_patterns.required_visual_behavior: Restrained rail treatment that separates concepts before interpretation.
visual_patterns.forbidden_visual_behavior: Generic divider, verdict stripe, severity color, or route/action affordance.
visual_patterns.non_authorization_statement: This visual pattern does not authorize engine, classifier, upload, scoring, fake/real output, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or public tool behavior.

visual_patterns.conceptual_function: Shows missing origin, source, or custody as confidence-limiting absence.
visual_patterns.required_visual_behavior: Soft recessed shadow and provenance line without accusation.
visual_patterns.forbidden_visual_behavior: Proof-of-deception styling, forensic target, or confidence meter.
visual_patterns.non_authorization_statement: This visual pattern does not authorize engine, classifier, upload, scoring, fake/real output, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or public tool behavior.

visual_patterns.conceptual_function: Presents missing information as a structural condition.
visual_patterns.required_visual_behavior: Absence field surface with quiet texture and readable copy.
visual_patterns.forbidden_visual_behavior: Error state, hidden failure, alarm state, or accusation marker.
visual_patterns.non_authorization_statement: This visual pattern does not authorize engine, classifier, upload, scoring, fake/real output, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or public tool behavior.

visual_patterns.conceptual_function: Protects Not Assessable as disciplined restraint.
visual_patterns.required_visual_behavior: Calm protected surface with restrained edge and non-error posture.
visual_patterns.forbidden_visual_behavior: Failure badge, warning alert, score substitute, or blocked frustration.
visual_patterns.non_authorization_statement: This visual pattern does not authorize engine, classifier, upload, scoring, fake/real output, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or public tool behavior.

visual_patterns.required_visual_behavior: Clear boundary hierarchy without action affordance.
visual_patterns.forbidden_visual_behavior: Blocked-task UI, product CTA, or punitive warning.
visual_patterns.non_authorization_statement: This visual pattern does not authorize engine, classifier, upload, scoring, fake/real output, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or public tool behavior.

visual_patterns.conceptual_function: Contains output as bounded and non-verdict.
visual_patterns.required_visual_behavior: Dashed envelope and containment surface that limits publication gravity.
visual_patterns.forbidden_visual_behavior: Final result panel, fake/real card, score panel, or generated output region.
visual_patterns.non_authorization_statement: This visual pattern does not authorize engine, classifier, upload, scoring, fake/real output, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or public tool behavior.

visual_patterns.conceptual_function: Shows questions as inquiry paths rather than proof.
visual_patterns.required_visual_behavior: Linear inquiry markers and calm question spacing.
visual_patterns.forbidden_visual_behavior: Certification path, proof checklist, progress meter, or verification guarantee.
visual_patterns.non_authorization_statement: This visual pattern does not authorize engine, classifier, upload, scoring, fake/real output, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, or public tool behavior.
